case_title: PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. JERRY MCINTOSH ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: DEFENDANT JERRY MCINTOSH PAID FEES ON 1/20/16. (206)
